properties.title: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.address: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.description:
We are proud to present this stylish two bedroom, two bathroom apartment in Landmark Pinnacle. Immaculately presented, the property comprises an open plan kitchen living area, two double bedrooms with built in storage, ensuite and main bathroom. Finished to a superb standard throughout, key features include stone worktops in the kitchen and porcelain tiles in the bathroom. 

Landmark Pinnacle is one of the most prestigious developments in Canary Wharf and residents will benefit from 24 hour concierge, private gym, cinema, lounge, roof terrace and golf simulator to name a few of the world class facilities. It is ideally situated being only short walk to Heron Quays DLR station,  Canary Wharf Station for the Jubilee Line and Canary Wharf Pier for the Thames Clipper.With Crossrail arriving soon transport links are only set to get better. The Canary Wharf Estate is only a short walk away boasting an array of shops, bars and restaurants.

properties.title: Ability Place, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.address: Ability Place, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.description:
A bright two bedroom penthouse apartment situated on the 19th floor of this modern development, in a highly sought after location near South Quay DLR station.

The apartment includes two bathrooms, an open plan lounge/kitchen and a large roof terrace with panoramic views across London. Further benefits include 24 hour concierge, allocated parking and an onsite gym. Ability Place is ideally located only a few moments from the centre of Canary Wharf, allowing residents to enjoy all Canary Wharf has to offer. As well as providing access to the Jubilee Line and South Quay (DLR).

properties.title: OSTRO TOWER, 31 Harbour Way, London, E14 9ZP
properties.address: OSTRO TOWER, 31 Harbour Way, London, E14 9ZP
properties.description:
Greystar is delighted to introduce our premium collection of 1, 2 and 3 bedroom apartments at Sailmakers. Located close to Canary Wharf and South Quay Station with a 24Hour Reception and dedicated team based onsite.

These premium apartments offer spacious, beautifully presented premium living spaces with private balconies overlooking the Canary Wharf area equipped with all your home essentials to the highest specification. Living rooms are equipped with bespoke furniture and a multimedia stand to fit your TV. Kitchens are fully fitted with integrated Smeg appliances. Bathrooms are finished to the highest standards with bathtub and underfloor heating. Bedrooms come carpeted with ottoman king size beds and Hypos mattress and built in wardrobes.
Sailmakers is ideally located just 5 minutes from Canary Wharf providing access to London's underground service via the Jubilee Line and Elizabeth Line. South Quay station is the closest station providing the Docklands Light Railway (DLR) services on your doorstep.

At Sailmakers, our residents can enjoy an excellent range of services and onsite amenities including:

*	Pet Friendly Apartments
*	Dedicated Property Manager and Maintenance Team onsite
*	24 Hour Reception
*	Cinema and Lounge on the 8th Floor
*	Resident Gym on 34th Floor with stunning 360 degrees views of the city
*	Yoga Room/ Spinning Room/Therapy Room/Circuit Studio/Chillout Room
*	35th floor Club Rooms with Pool Table and Library
*       Private Dining Room to book for your own entertainment
*	Outdoor Roof Terraces
*	Co-working Spaces and Meeting Rooms onsite
*	Dry cleaning Services
*	Post/Parcel Room
*      Resident Events
*	Bike Storage & Secure and Gated Car Park Stacker system
*      Minimum 12 months Tenancies available

*Images and floorplans used are for illustrative purposes only. Individual apartment sizes, features, furniture and layouts may vary.
										
Enjoy 30 Days of Worry-Free Living with Our Peace of Mind Guarantee!
At Greystar, we care so much about the comfort and experience of our residents in their new home, and we are committed to providing you with the best rental experience in the market. If for any reason you feel we haven't met this promise, you can terminate your tenancy by providing 30 days' notice at any time within the first 30 days of your agreement. Terms & Conditions apply*.

Virtual Tours Available - Contact us now to arrange a viewing

Find out more at sailmakers-london.co.uk
